toys.title: sonicc
toys.description: Keys, drums, pattern sequencer, sampler, and mic recorder. 16 presets, 9 waveforms, 12 FX, stereo knobs, MIDI support, WAV export.

toys.title: Stem Studio
toys.description: Upload any song and split it into vocals, drums, bass, and other stems with AI. Effects, pitch shift, time stretch, sample maker, and mix export.

toys.title: Plink
toys.description: Drop marbles and hear them play. A pentatonic plinko board where every bounce is a note. Click pegs to toggle them.

toys.title: Synth Pad
toys.description: Touch or click and drag to play. An XY pad instrument with pentatonic tuning and warm oscillators.

toys.title: Kaleidoscopic
toys.description: Upload any image and watch it fold into living geometry. 8 symmetry patterns, real-time WebGL rendering, video recording.

toys.title: Aurora
toys.description: Move your cursor through living light. An interactive aurora borealis rendered in real time.

toys.title: String Art
toys.description: Modular multiplication on geometric shapes creates impossibly intricate patterns. Move your cursor to shape the strings.

toys.title: Gravity Type
toys.description: Type anything and watch it fall. Letters tumble, stack, and scatter with real physics. Click to explode.

toys.title: Particle Life
toys.description: Colored particles follow simple attraction rules and create complex, organic behavior. Click to create a new universe.

toys.title: Aurea
toys.description: Fibonacci-driven parametric line art. 6 original forms, 4K rendering, video recording. Thousands of lines from pure equations, biology from math.

toys.title: Zen Garden
toys.description: Ink and Void, a CSS Zen Garden submission. 1800+ lines of pure CSS: scroll-driven animations, oklch color, @property, subgrid. Zero images, zero JS.
